_comment: FIP Power BI RLS Role → AAD Group Mapping. Maintained by IT Administrator. Changes here must be synchronised to the Power BI dataset via sync_rls_aad.py.

roles.description: Full group-level visibility — sees all entities in their consolidation group. No audit table PII.
Full entity access, full financial data, no direct quarantine PII.
Full entity access plus audit tables including quarantine and DQ logs.
Sees only their assigned cost centres. Entity-level totals not visible.
roles._note: silver.dim_cost_centre.manager_name must contain the user's UPN exactly as registered in AAD.

roles.description: Read-only access to financial statements and audit trail. No transaction-level PII. Limited to audit-period entities.
roles._note: Update entity_code list for each audit engagement. Remove auditor group membership immediately after audit completion.
